heading: sama kids
intro1: Our award-winning Kids Yoga Program at Sama fosters community, social skills, and leadership through yoga and meditation practices for children ages 6 and up. At Sama, children discover the tools to regulate and greet the world with a kind heart. Drop off your young yogi every Wednesday at 4:30 pm during the school year or book a private lesson here.
instructorBio1: Allie Muzzio is a licensed Occupational Therapist and registered yoga teacher, completing both the 200-Hour Yoga Teacher Training and Kids Yoga Teacher Training at Sama Academy. She holds a Master's degree in Occupational Therapy with a minor in Psychology, integrating evidence-based OT principles with nervous system support, functional movement, and embodied awareness.
intro2: Sold as a 10-class package for use within 3 months. Reserve your spot with purchase now. If you need to miss a class, you or your child can make it up with any class on our schedule.
instructorBio2: With specialized training in Pediatric Yoga & Mindfulness, Allie guides students of all ages in developing tools for safety, confidence, and self-regulation — both on and off the mat. Her approach blends therapeutic insight with accessible movement and breath awareness, helping students meet themselves with curiosity and kindness.
instructorBio3: She looks forward to supporting you and your children here at Sama!

faqs.question: What should my child wear and bring?
faqs.answer: We provide mats to borrow, water and props.

faqs.question: What if my child is new to yoga?
faqs.answer: Beginners are always welcome. Each class is designed to be accessible no matter where your child is starting from.

faqs.question: What if I miss a class?
faqs.answer: No worries! If you need to miss a session, your child (or you) can make up with any class on our schedule.

faqs.question: Should we stay for class or drop off?
faqs.answer: Drop your child off, we take care of the rest.

faqs.question: What if my child is energetic?
faqs.answer: Our lessons include meditation tools, so the wandering mind is taught how to refocus. Yoga meets kids where they are — energy and all.
